title: գարուններ
definition: (Noun) Nominative plural of գարուն (springs, the seasons).

title: եք
definition: (Verb) Second-person plural present of եմ (you are).

title: ծառան
definition: (Noun) Definite nominative singular of ծառա (the servant).

title: հուզող
definition: (Verb) Subject participle of հուզել (exciting, touching, moving).

title: հրո
definition: (Noun) Dative singular of հուր (to the fire).

title: չեղան
definition: (Verb) Negative form of եղան (they were not).

title: չեղանք
definition: (Verb) Negative form of եղանք (we were not).

title: չեղար
definition: (Verb) Negative form of եղար (you [sg.] were not).

title: չեղաք
definition: (Verb) Negative form of եղաք (you [pl.] were not).

title: չեմ
definition: (Verb) Negative form of եմ (I am not).

title: ջուրը
definition: (Noun) Definite nominative singular of ջուր (the water).

title: ջրի
definition: (Noun) Dative singular of ջուր (to the water).
